tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: I'm only 10% done with this assignment, but since nothing else is urgent and I'm low on sleep, I'll just power through the rest now before my teammates meet up.
I power-ran this last-minute, but my teammates are already waiting for lunch. That deadline panic was unnecessary; I should have just asked them to help me earlier.

desires: Not look like the unreliable teammate who drags everyone down when I finally show up late for lunch
Feel relieved that I actually finished this assignment without another last-minute panic spiral
Get immediate validation from my close friends that I'm still 'one of us' despite my recent flakiness

goals.description: Finish the last 10% of the assignment and hit submit immediately so I don't have to face my teammates or the professor with a half-finished mess.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value is too high to risk looking like a slacker in front of cohort_3; my assertiveness means I won't wait for 'perfect' conditions, and my impulsive nature makes me want to just power through the final barrier right now rather than planning for tomorrow.

goals.description: Grab a quick snack and sit down with the close friend group for dinner before the stress of the deadline creeps back in.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority (50%), but my short planning horizon and sleep debt mean I'm tempted to drop this if the submission drags on. I'll only do it if I finish the work quickly.

agent.last_reasoning: Goal g1 is done; submitting earlier avoids awkwardness with prof. Now prioritizing g2 (relationships) over sleep due to impulsive short-term focus. Messaging first reassures them before we meet.
